phase_name: Gantt UI Polish 3 — Panel Header Alignment, Bar Drag-Resize Unification, Back Button Fix, Excel-Style Task Entry

completed_tasks.name: Fix Plan 01 bug — add #ganttHeaderOverlay top:0 change
Update STATE.md to Ready to execute

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT after execution — verify header flush at multiple panel widths, bar extend gesture, back nav, Excel Enter
human_actions_pending.context: No automated tests; all verification is manual in the browser via python -m http.server 8000

decisions.decision: Plan 01 must change BOTH #ganttPane padding-top AND #ganttHeaderOverlay top
decisions.rationale: renderCustomGanttHeader() is still active (called at lines 1122 and 1138 of project-plan.js) and appends a position:absolute div with top:8px into #ganttPane. Removing padding-top without adjusting top:8px leaves the overlay 8px below SVG origin.
Same formula used by Frappe internally; guarantees dragged pixels map to the same day-unit as the timeline header.

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 86.5 to execute all 3 plans in wave order (01+02 parallel Wave 1, then 03 Wave 2)
context_notes: Planning complete. The 3 plans are self-contained and ready. Plan 01 was corrected this session to include both CSS changes (#ganttPane padding-top removed AND #ganttHeaderOverlay top: 8px → top: 0). Execution should be straightforward — no design ambiguities remain. All 4 success criteria have clear implementation paths.
